title: Print management: document node registration + settings resolution for a custom document
instruction: In the sandbox model, wire a custom document into print management. Ground it first with get_knowledge(topic="print-management"). Create: (1) a base enum DemoPrintDocType (extensible, labelled) with a single element DemoConfirmation representing the new document; (2) a class DemoPrintMgmtDocType that registers the document node - implement the default-report-format and node-description members the framework expects, returning the SSRS report design name as a plain str constant; (3) a class DemoPrintMgmtRunner with `public static void printFor(Num _documentId)` that resolves the print-management settings for the document through the PrintMgmtDocType/PrintMgmtSettings API (never by constructing an SRSPrintDestinationSettings by hand), applies the resolved settings to an SRSReportRun-style controller, and infologs a labelled message when no setting is configured. Confirm every print-management class and member signature with search/get_method before writing it - do not guess. All objects must build with zero BP errors.
